entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A traditional crop grown in marginal areas of Africa and Asia, rich in micronutrients, phytochemicals, vitamins, and essential amino acids.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A persistent deficiency of essential micronutrients contributing to deaths in developing countries.

entities.name: INFECTIONS
entities.description: Health issues associated with micronutrient deficiency.

entities.name: CHRONIC DISEASES
entities.description: Long-term health issues associated with micronutrient deficiency.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where finger millet is grown in marginal areas.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where finger millet is grown in marginal areas.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Health benefitting nutrients including iron, zinc, calcium, magnesium, sodium, and potassium.

entities.name: PHYTOCHEMICALS
entities.description: Health benefitting chemical compounds found in finger millet.

entities.name: VITAMINS
entities.description: Essential organic compounds found in finger millet.

entities.name: ESSENTIAL AMINO ACIDS
entities.description: Building blocks of proteins found in finger millet.

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity and variation used to understand the genetic control of health benefitting traits.

entities.name: GENOMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: Large-scale study of genomes used to understand the genetic control of health benefitting traits.

entities.name: STAPLE CROPS
entities.description: Crops consumed on a daily basis into which health benefitting traits are bred.

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A specific micronutrient characterized in finger millet genotypes.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A specific micronutrient characterized in finger millet genotypes.

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A specific micronutrient characterized in finger millet genotypes.

entities.name: MAGNESIUM
entities.description: A specific micronutrient characterized in finger millet genotypes.

entities.name: SODIUM
entities.description: A specific micronutrient characterized in finger millet genotypes.

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A specific micronutrient characterized in finger millet genotypes.

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutritional component characterized in finger millet genotypes.

entities.name: ANTI-NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Compounds such as phytate and oxalate that affect the bioavailability of nutrients.

entities.name: PHYTATE
entities.description: A specific anti-nutrient characterized in finger millet.

entities.name: OXALATE
entities.description: A specific anti-nutrient characterized in finger millet.

entities.name: GBS
entities.description: Genotyping-by-sequencing used to generate SNPs for association panels.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used in genome-wide association studies.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: Studies used to identify genomic regions associated with specific traits.

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Specific areas of the genome associated with health benefitting traits and bioavailability.

entities.name: BIOAVAILABILITY
entities.description: The extent and rate at which nutrients are absorbed and used by the body.
